creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Created attachment 239164
poudriere log showing build failure for stable/12

www/p5-WWW-Curl-4.17_4 failed to build via poudriere, both in stable/12:
FreeBSD 12.4-STABLE #170 stable/12-n235915-bcd220664443: Fri Dec 30 11:33:10 UTC 2022     root@freebeast.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64 1204500 1204500

and stable/13:
FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #248 stable/13-n253346-2c88fb783f75: Sat Dec 31 11:39:07 UTC 2022     root@freebeast.catwhisker.org:/common/S3/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64 1301510 1301510

The ports tree is at main-n604737-f9b388ab1fd7.

Poudriere is poudriere-devel-3.3.99.20220831.

Logs attached.
